description: Letter from a physician to his uncle. Tells the writer's sad story, which involved the death of his beloved wife, an unfortunate second marriage, and his eventual flight. The writer asks his uncle to give his son the family bible. (Edited, translated, and analyzed at length in Oded Zinger's dissertation, chapter 5 and document #10.)
tags: personal, Illness: treatment, Illness, 12th c, Illness: physician, illness: marad, grief, illness: chronic, illness: letter norms, illness letter 969-1517
description_he: מכתב מרופא לדודו. מספר את סיפורו העצוב: מות אשתו האהובה, נישואין שניים כושלים ובריחתו בסופו של דבר. הכותב מבקש מדודו לתת לבנו את תנ"ך המשפחה.
